results.resolved_title: Lipase secretion by bacterial hybrid ATP-binding cassette exporters: molecular recognition of the LipBCD, PrtDEF, and HasDEF exporters.
results.quote: LipA, HasA, and E. chrysanthemi PrtC were secreted via heterologous exporters and via some hybrid exporters.
results.note: PrtC of E. chrysanthemi secreted by ABC (T1SS) exporters; abstract only (full text not in PMC).

results.resolved_title: Lipase secretion by bacterial hybrid ATP-binding cassette exporters: molecular recognition of the LipBCD, PrtDEF, and HasDEF exporters.
results.quote: PrtA, which shows homology to the Erwinia chrysanthemi metalloproteases, is efficiently secreted by E. coli cells carrying the E. chrysanthemi ABC exporter PrtD (ABC protein)-PrtE (MFP)-PrtF (OMP).
results.note: E. chrysanthemi PrtA, ABC/T1SS (PrtDEF) exporter; abstract only.

results.resolved_title: Lipase secretion by bacterial hybrid ATP-binding cassette exporters: molecular recognition of the LipBCD, PrtDEF, and HasDEF exporters.
results.note: Paper subject is S. marcescens / E. chrysanthemi (title+abstract). Photorhabdus laumondii plu0655 is an unrelated homolog; paper makes no claim about it.

results.resolved_title: Lipase secretion by bacterial hybrid ATP-binding cassette exporters: molecular recognition of the LipBCD, PrtDEF, and HasDEF exporters.
results.note: Paper subject is S. marcescens / E. chrysanthemi. Photorhabdus sp. Az29 PrtA (P82115) is an unrelated homolog not addressed by this paper.

results.resolved_title: Lipase secretion by bacterial hybrid ATP-binding cassette exporters: molecular recognition of the LipBCD, PrtDEF, and HasDEF exporters.
results.quote: a unique exporter, the Lip apparatus, in S. marcescens secretes both LipA and PrtA.
results.note: S. marcescens metalloprotease PrtA (= serralysin, P23694) secreted by the Lip ABC/T1SS apparatus; abstract only.

results.resolved_title: Lipase secretion by bacterial hybrid ATP-binding cassette exporters: molecular recognition of the LipBCD, PrtDEF, and HasDEF exporters.
results.note: Paper subject is S. marcescens / E. chrysanthemi. Photorhabdus temperata PrtA (Q49GQ9) is an unrelated homolog not addressed.

results.resolved_title: Lipase secretion by bacterial hybrid ATP-binding cassette exporters: molecular recognition of the LipBCD, PrtDEF, and HasDEF exporters.
results.note: Correct organism (S. marcescens) and system (T1SS protease secretion), but this modern genome locus tag is not named in the 1997 abstract; full text not in PMC, so cannot confirm this specific protein.

results.resolved_title: Lipase secretion by bacterial hybrid ATP-binding cassette exporters: molecular recognition of the LipBCD, PrtDEF, and HasDEF exporters.
results.note: Correct organism (S. marcescens), but this modern locus tag is not named in the abstract; full text unavailable, cannot confirm this specific protein.

results.resolved_title: Lipase secretion by bacterial hybrid ATP-binding cassette exporters: molecular recognition of the LipBCD, PrtDEF, and HasDEF exporters.
results.note: Paper subject is S. marcescens / E. chrysanthemi. Serratia proteamaculans serralysin (Q2VU40) is a different organism; paper makes no claim about it.

results.resolved_title: Lipase secretion by bacterial hybrid ATP-binding cassette exporters: molecular recognition of the LipBCD, PrtDEF, and HasDEF exporters.
results.note: Paper subject is S. marcescens / E. chrysanthemi. Xenorhabdus innexi PrtA (XIS1_1310038) is an unrelated homolog not addressed.

results.resolved_title: Multiple Type II Secretion Substrates, Including a Novel Protein, Contribute to Differential Infection of the Amoebae Acanthamoeba, Hartmannella, and Naegleria.
results.quote: T2S substrates NttA, NttB, and LegP were targeted for mutation.
results.note: L. pneumophila T2S (T2SS) substrate; abstract (full text not in PMC).

results.resolved_title: Multiple Type II Secretion Substrates, Including a Novel Protein, Contribute to Differential Infection of the Amoebae Acanthamoeba, Hartmannella, and Naegleria.
results.quote: T2S substrates NttA, NttB, and LegP were targeted for mutation.
results.note: L. pneumophila T2S (T2SS) substrate; abstract.

results.resolved_title: Multiple Type II Secretion Substrates, Including a Novel Protein, Contribute to Differential Infection of the Amoebae Acanthamoeba, Hartmannella, and Naegleria.
results.note: NttC not named in abstract; PMC full text empty and journal full text 403. Cannot confirm.

results.resolved_title: Multiple Type II Secretion Substrates, Including a Novel Protein, Contribute to Differential Infection of the Amoebae Acanthamoeba, Hartmannella, and Naegleria.
results.note: NttD not named in abstract; PMC full text empty and journal full text 403. Cannot confirm.

results.resolved_title: A naturally occurring truncated form of FosB that inhibits Fos/Jun transcriptional activity
results.note: Cited DOI resolves (Crossref) to Nakabeppu & Nathans, Cell 1991, a mammalian FosB/Fos-Jun transcription-factor paper. Not about Yersinia YopH or any T3SS effector.

results.resolved_title: A naturally occurring truncated form of FosB that inhibits Fos/Jun transcriptional activity
results.note: Cited DOI resolves (Crossref) to a FosB/Fos-Jun paper (Cell 1991), not the Yersinia YopH phosphatase work. Wrong subject for Y. enterocolitica YopH too.

results.resolved_title: Mycobacterium tuberculosis heat shock protein 60 modulates immune response to PPD by manipulating the surface expression of TLR2 on macrophages
results.note: Cited DOI resolves (Crossref) to a M. tuberculosis Hsp60/TLR2 paper, not the E. coli O157 EspM T3SS effector. (The real EspM1/EspM2 paper is DOI 10.1111/j.1462-5822.2008.01136.x.)

results.resolved_title: Mycobacterium tuberculosis heat shock protein 60 modulates immune response to PPD by manipulating the surface expression of TLR2 on macrophages
results.note: Cited DOI resolves to a M. tuberculosis Hsp60/TLR2 paper, not the E. coli EspM T3SS effector. Mis-cited DOI (correct paper is .01136).

results.resolved_title: Intraspecies Competition in Serratia marcescens Is Mediated by Type VI-Secreted Rhs Effectors and a Conserved Effector-Associated Accessory Protein
results.quote: we have demonstrated that Rhs1 and Rhs2 ofDb10 are new T6SS-dependent antibacterial effectors.
results.note: Rhs1 = SMDB11_2278 (PAAR-Rhs), T6SS effector of S. marcescens Db10; full text.

results.resolved_title: Intraspecies Competition in Serratia marcescens Is Mediated by Type VI-Secreted Rhs Effectors and a Conserved Effector-Associated Accessory Protein
results.quote: we have demonstrated that Rhs1 and Rhs2 ofDb10 are new T6SS-dependent antibacterial effectors.
results.note: Rhs2 = SMDB11_1610, T6SS-dependent DNase effector of S. marcescens Db10; full text confirms T6SS-dependent secretion.

results.resolved_title: In search of Brucella abortus Type IV secretion substrates: screening and identification of four proteins translocated into host cells through VirB system
results.quote: four of them, encoded by genes BAB1_1043, BAB1_2005, BAB1_1275 and BAB2_0123, require a functional T4SS for their delivery.
results.note: BAB1_1275 (BPE123), VirB/T4SS substrate of B. abortus 2308; full text + abstract.

results.resolved_title: In search of Brucella abortus Type IV secretion substrates: screening and identification of four proteins translocated into host cells through VirB system
results.quote: four of them, encoded by genes BAB1_1043, BAB1_2005, BAB1_1275 and BAB2_0123, require a functional T4SS for their delivery.
results.note: BAB1_2005 (BPE005), VirB/T4SS substrate of B. abortus 2308; full text + abstract.

results.resolved_title: A Salmonella type III effector, PipA, works in a different manner than the PipA family effectors GogA and GtgA
results.quote: We also showed that PipA was secreted into RAW264.7 cells through T3SS-2.
results.note: S. Typhimurium (STM1087) T3SS effector; full text.

results.resolved_title: Invasive Bacterial Pathogens Exploit TLR-Mediated Downregulation of Tight Junction Components to Facilitate Translocation across the Epithelium
results.note: Full text (PMC) is about S. pneumoniae / N. meningitidis crossing the epithelium via TLR-mediated tight-junction downregulation. No mention of Vibrio parahaemolyticus, T3SS, or VPA0450 (0 hits in full text).

results.resolved_title: The Legionella Effector RavZ Inhibits Host Autophagy Through Irreversible Atg8 Deconjugation
results.quote: the intracellular pathogencould interfere with autophagy using the bacterial effector protein RavZ to directly uncouple Atg8 proteins
results.note: L. pneumophila Philadelphia-1 RavZ (lpg1683); full text: Dot/Icm (T4SS) translocated effector.

results.resolved_title: Identification and Characterization of an RTX Toxin in the Emerging Pathogen Kingella kingae.
results.quote: Using mariner mutagenesis and a screen for loss of cytotoxicity, a genetic locus encoding an RTX toxin system was identified.
results.note: Kingella kingae (pediatric septic arthritis/osteomyelitis pathogen, organism masked in abstract). RTX toxin is a canonical T1SS substrate; abstract only (full text not in PMC).

results.resolved_title: Genome-Wide Detection of Fitness Genes in Uropathogenic Escherichia coli during Systemic Infection
results.note: Full text is about uropathogenic E. coli (CFT073) fitness genes in bacteremia. 0 mentions of BepE, Bartonella, or VirB in 64k-char full text. Not about the B. henselae T4SS effector BepE.

results.resolved_title: Targeting eEF1A by a Legionella pneumophila effector leads to inhibition of protein synthesis and induction of host stress response
results.quote: We demonstrate that this protein, called SidI, is a substrate of the Dot/Icm type IV protein transporter that targets the host protein translation process.
results.note: L. pneumophila Philadelphia 1 SidI (lpg2504); Dot/Icm = T4SS; full text.

results.resolved_title: The CXCL12/CXCR4 Signaling Pathway: A New Susceptibility Factor in Human Papillomavirus Pathogenesis
results.note: Cited DOI (and its PMC PMC5138052) resolves to an HPV / CXCL12-CXCR4 host-signaling paper. 0 mentions of LegC3, Legionella, or Dot/Icm. Not about the L. pneumophila T4SS effector.

results.resolved_title: Association of a Functional Variant in the Wnt Co-Receptor LRP6 with Early Onset Ileal Crohn's Disease
results.note: Cited DOI (PMC PMC3285585) resolves to a human LRP6/Wnt ileal Crohn's disease genetics paper. 0 mentions of T6SS, TssM, or E. coli 042. Not about the Sci1 T6SS component.

results.resolved_title: The Pseudomonas aeruginosa PAAR2 cluster encodes a putative VRR-NUC domain-containing effector.
results.quote: we report a putative virus-type replication-repair nuclease domain-containing effector TseV encoded by the least investigated P. aeruginosa PAAR2 cluster.
results.note: P. aeruginosa (PA0822) T6SS effector (TseV-TsiV E-I pair); abstract.

results.resolved_title: Secretion and activation of the Serratia marcescens hemolysin by structurally defined ShlB mutants.
results.quote: The ShlA hemolysin of Serratia marcescens is secreted across the outer membrane by the ShlB protein; ShlB belongs to the two-partner secretion system (type Vb)
results.note: S. marcescens ShlA hemolysin, secreted by ShlB two-partner secretion (T5bSS); abstract.
